title: amauropelta santae-catharinae
intro: Amauropelta santae-catharinae, also known as the Amua fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Amua fern include its ability to reduce swelling, ease pain, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Amua fern are often dried and used as a tea or added to topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
